things.name: Po Nagar Cham Towers
things.description: 8th-century Cham Hindu temple towers on a hilltop above the mouth of the Cai River

things.name: Nha Trang Bay Island Hopping
things.description: Boat trip to offshore islands with snorkelling, beach time and seafood lunch

things.name: Nha Trang Beach
things.description: 6km white-sand beach curving around the bay with a vibrant cafe scene

things.name: VinWonders Theme Park (Vinpearl)
things.description: Cable car to the island amusement park across Nha Trang Bay

things.name: Ba Ho Waterfalls
things.description: Three mountain waterfall pools accessible by motorbike and jungle trek

things.name: Hot Spring Mud Bath
things.description: Volcanic mud baths in private tubs - popular Nha Trang spa experience

things.name: Long Son Pagoda
things.description: Buddhist pagoda with a giant white Buddha on the hillside above the city

things.name: Pasteur Institute Museum
things.description: Former research institute of Alexandre Yersin who discovered plague

things.name: Scuba Diving in Nha Trang
things.description: Over 25 dive sites in the marine protected area around the bay islands

things.name: Bun Ca (Fish Noodle Soup)
things.description: Nha Trang's signature breakfast soup with fresh fish, pineapple and herbs
